# arenaml_pipeline_step (Resource)

node of type step



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (Attributes) configuration for the step execution (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `kind` (String) id of the pipeline this step is part of
- `name` (String) The unique name of the basis
- `pipeline_id` (String) id of the pipeline this step is part of

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the basis
- `engine_id` (String) engine to use for executing this step
- `store_id` (String) override for store to be used in place of default store for that env

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The timestamp when the basis was created
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the basis
- `updated` (String) The timestamp when the basis was last updated
- `version` (Number) The version of the basis

<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Optional:

- `args` (List of String) arguments for the command
- `command` (String) command to execute in the container
- `env_vars` (Map of String) environment variables for the container
- `image` (String) container image for the step
- `privileged` (Boolean) run container in privileged mode
- `registry_auth` (Map of String, Sensitive) authentication credentials for registry
- `run_spec` (String) resource and other limits along with driver override
